_publications._publicationTitle: C6 Cell Injection into the Optic Nerve of Long-Evans Rats: A Short-Term Model of Optic Pathway Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: S100 surface coverage was significantly higher in the test tissue (16%) compared to the control test (1.4%)
details: Successfully detected S100 protein with 16% surface coverage in test tissue versus 1.4% in control tissue
